X-H2S COMPANION

Tutorial · Presets · SOS · Manual · Exercises

More

About this app

The X-H2S Companion is an unofficial companion app for the Fujifilm X-H2S: tutorial, preset guide, troubleshooting, a searchable manual, and an exercise plan — works completely offline.

Created by: Norman Philipps

Version 1.0.0

Language

This app automatically detects once whether your browser prefers German, then remembers your choice from then on.

Deutsch
